tasks.name: Task 1: Add workspace dependencies and create SseEvent types + SSE handler
tasks.notes: Also included AppState event_tx field and broadcast::channel(1024) construction (logically Task 2 work) because events_handler references state.event_tx — splitting would leave crate non-compiling between commits. Deviation Rule 3 (fix blocking issues) applied.

tasks.name: Task 2: Extend AppState with broadcast channel and register SSE route
tasks.notes: Route registration and doc comment updates only — state.rs and main.rs changes were pulled into Task 1 commit for compile coherence.

deviations.description: AppState event_tx field and broadcast channel construction (planned for Task 2) were committed with Task 1 because events_handler in events.rs directly references state.event_tx — the crate cannot compile without both pieces present. Task 2 commit covers only the route registration in api/mod.rs.
deviations.impact: No functional impact — same total changes, different commit boundary
